view.title: Duba VPS {id}
view.nextInvoiceDate: Ranar Takardar Biyan Kuɗi Mai Zuwa:
view.usedSpace: Sararin da aka yi amfani da shi:
view.emailSentMessage: An sake aika imel na maraba. Duba akwatin imel ɗinka.
view.reinstallNote: Kuna iya sake shigarwa daga menu na hagu
view.reinstallPath: Kulawa -> Sake Shigar da Tsarin Aiki
view.cpanelNote: Panel na sarrafa dole ne a shigar da shi akan sabo na OS install ba tare da canje-canje ba. Idan akwai bayanai za a rasa su.
view.resendWelcomeEmailConfirm: Shin kuna da tabbacin cewa kuna son sake aika imel na maraba?

order.title: Oda VPS
order.tosAgree: Na karanta sharuɗɗan da ke sama kuma na yarda.
order.rootPasswordNote: Lura: Kalmar sirri dole ta ƙunshi aƙalla haruffa 8, harafi ɗaya na ƙanƙanta, harafi ɗaya na babba, lamba ɗaya, da alama ta musamman ɗaya.
order.subscriptionRenewal: Za a sabunta biyan kuɗi kai tsaye bayan {period} akan {cost} har sai an soke.
order.tosAcknowledgment: Ta hanyar ticking wannan akwati, kuna amincewa cewa kuna siyan kayan biyan kuɗi wanda ke sabuntawa kai tsaye kuma an caje shi zuwa katin kiredit da kuka bayar a yau. Idan kuna so ku soke sabuntawar kai tsaye, kuna iya shiga tashar abokin ciniki zaɓi sabis ɗin da ke aiki kuma danna haɗin Soke ko aika imel a: billing{'@'}interserver.net. Ta hanyar ticking akwatin kuma danna Sanya Odana a ƙasa, kuna kuma amincewa cewa kun karanta, fahimta, kuma kun amince da Sharuɗɗan mu da Manufar Sirrin mu.
order.couponUsed: Coupon da aka yi amfani da shi

changeRootPassword.title: Canza Kalmar Sirri ta Root na VPS
changeRootPassword.passwordMismatch: Kalmar Sirri da Tabbatar da Kalmar Sirri ba su dace ba

reinstallOs.title: Sake Girka Tsarin Aiki
reinstallOs.importantNote1: Sake girka tsarin aiki zai share duk bayanai.
reinstallOs.importantNote2: Kafin sake girka tsarin aiki, don Allah ɗauki ajiyar bayanai.
reinstallOs.confirmReinstallButton: Tabbatar da Sake Girka Tsarin Aiki
reinstallOs.confirmReinstall: Ina son sake shigar da OS!

buyIp.title: Ƙarin IP don VPS ɗinku
buyIp.existingAddonIps: IP ɗin Ƙari da ke akwai

buyHdSpace.title: Sararin Faifai na VPS Ƙari
buyHdSpace.spaceNote: Mafi ƙaranci 1 zuwa 100GB na sararin HD ƙari ana iya siyan

changeTimezone.title: Canza Yankin Lokaci na {module}
changeTimezone.importantNote1: Ya kamata ku kashe {module} gaba ɗaya kafin canza yankin lokaci.
changeTimezone.importantNote2: VPS za a kashe shi kuma za a sake kunna shi yayin tsarin.
changeTimezone.importantNote3: Yankin lokaci a wannan shafin zai kasance a America/New_York ko da yaushe ba tare da la'akari da abin da aka saita kan serverku ba.

changeWebuzoPassword.title: Canza Kalmar Sirri ta Admin na Webuzo
changeWebuzoPassword.portalLoginPassword: Kalmar Sirri ta Shiga Tashar Mu
changeWebuzoPassword.passwordMismatch: Kalmar sirri da tabbatarwa ba su dace ba

resetPassword.title: Sake Saita Kalmar Sirri ta VPS
resetPassword.windowsWarning: Sake saita kalmar sirri ta Windows zai haifar da kashe ba daidai ba. Da fatan za a yi la'akari da wannan a matsayin zaɓin ƙarshe. Tabbatar a VNC cewa ba a gudanar da sabuntuwa a yanzu. Idan sabuntawa tana gudana VNC za ta nuna: Windows na amfani da sabuntuwa, kada ku kashe. Kashe a wannan halin na iya haifar da na'urar da ba za ta ƙaddamar ba.
resetPassword.confirmReset: Ina son Sake Saita Kalmar Sirri!

reverseDns.title: DNS na Baya
reverseDns.dnsChangeNote: Canje-canje zuwa DNS na baya na ɗaukar zuwa awa ɗaya don bayyana.

vnc.remoteDesktopDescription: Yana samuwa kawai akan dandali na Windows. Teburin nesa hanya ce mai sauri kuma mai sauƙi don haɗawa da teburin na'urar kama-da-wane.
vnc.remoteDesktopStep1: Kalmar sirri ta mai gudanarwa dole ta fara a saita akan VPS kafin za ku iya amfani da teburin nesa.
vnc.remoteDesktopStep2: Haɗa ta VNC ko HTML5 VNC don saita kalmar sirri ta farko.
vnc.desktopVncDescription: VNC yana ba ku damar haɗawa da teburin na'urar kama-da-wane. VNC ana iya gudanar da shi a cikin mai bincike ko a matsayin abokin ciniki mai zaman kansa. Dole a ba wa adireshin IP na kwamfutarka damar shiga kafin a kafa haɗin.
vnc.grantIpAccess: Ba IP ɗinku Damar shiga VNC
vnc.grantIpWait: Da fatan za ku jira minti 2 don aikin ya ƙare.
vnc.vncClientNote: Kuna iya kuma sauke ɗaya daga cikin abokan ciniki da yawa na VNC da ke samuwa a intanet. Muna ba da shawarar TightVNC. Haɗa ta amfani da adireshin IP na VPS ɗinku. Ba a buƙatar kalmar sirri bayan an ba wa adireshin IP na nesa damar shiga a matakin 1.
vnc.connectHtml5: Don haɗawa ta amfani da abokin ciniki na HTML5 VNC:
vnc.connectOldLayout: Don haɗawa ta amfani da tsarin tsohon:
vnc.html5Note: Abokin ciniki na HTML5 VNC wanda ke aiki da kyau a cikin kowane mai bincike na zamani ciki har da masu bincike na wayar hannu (iOS da Android).

setupVnc.title: Saita VNC
setupVnc.ipToGrant: IP da za a ba damar shiga VNC
setupVnc.grantAccess: Ba VNC Damar shiga ga IP

insertCd.insertIso: Saka Hoton ISO a Cikin Faifan CD-ROM
insertCd.urlPlaceholder: Shigar da URL na ISO na CD ko DVD

backup.backupsPartitionNote: Ajiyar kwafi na aiki ne kawai tare da rarrabuwa ta asali.
backup.confirmBackup: Kuna da gaske kuna son ɗaukar ajiyar kwafi?

restore.offlineNote: Serverku zai kasance a layi a wajen yayin da yake maye gurbin duk fayilolin ku na yanzu da waɗanda ke cikin ajiyar kwafi. Da fatan za a tuntuɓi tallafi tare da kowace tambaya.
restore.loginPasswordLabel: Shigar da Kalmar Sirri ta Shiga don Tabbatar da Maido.
restore.confirmRestore: Kuna da gaske kuna son maido da wannan ajiyar kwafi?

trafficUsage.title: Amfanin Bandwidth / Zirga-zirga
trafficUsage.billingNote: Ba a yi amfani da wannan don lissafin cajin kuma kimanta kawai ne dangane da katunan hanyar sadarwar ku na kama-da-wane.

slices.title: Ƙara / Rage Yankuna
slices.slicesNote: Har zuwa yankuna 32 ana iya haɗa su da VPS.
slices.proratedNote: Adadin da za a biya yanzu.
slices.recurringBillNote: Cajin da ke maimaituwa zai canza da wannan yawa
slices.newInvoiceNote: Sabbin lissafai za su kashe wannan yawa
